artifacts.title: Exgenesis receipt from 2025-10-15
artifacts.excerpt:
Yay for shipping early! There's obviously still lots that could be improved, especially in how the search works. I welcome feedback in thread, DMs, email.

Link to app:
https://t.co/OAchDG96BH
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: exgenesis, egregoregalore, love, tweets.

artifacts.title: Exgenesis receipt from 2025-10-01
artifacts.excerpt:
Tweets are spells, whispers to the universe, energies that will multiply and sparkle in the synapses of those who see them

Being able to cast a spell on you, on the other side of the world, is nothing short of magic

This power overwhelms most of us

Stop fumbling it
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: exgenesis, egregoregalore, love, tweets.

artifacts.title: Exgenesis receipt from 2025-11-27
artifacts.excerpt:
Casa Tilo!

So much beauty in the house, the people, the energy, the gorgeous forest we were all embedded in. So much grace and skill in the hosting. Landing was easy and gentle, much easier than most other communities I've stayed with (actually a remarkable achievement and a big thing for me & my bf). I'm excited to see this project grow, and excited to go back ❤️☀️

@RichDecibels and @LombardoNati are making magic ✨

Also I'm hyped to finally have my own @danallison sticker

artifacts.title: Work receipt from 2025-10-15
artifacts.excerpt:
Magic Search for Community Archive is ready for your queries! So you can find your next cofounder/friend/fave account ✨

Curious if this is useful already as is, if I should work on it more, or if some other approach would have been better.

Link and 🧵 below: https://t.co/uw35J0ZUWV
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: work, account, every, day.

artifacts.title: Work receipt from 2025-09-01
artifacts.excerpt:
I'm really scared of sharing unfinished work but here goes: 

I'm working on a little project built on Community Archive, for searching across all users. The idea is that you can put very specific queries for people and the results will be so fitting it will feel like ✨ magic ✨ https://t.co/GyakVFT69W
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: work, account, every, day.

artifacts.title: Work receipt from 2025-10-15
artifacts.excerpt: Context TL;DR: CA is a relatively small dataset, so this project serves as a demo/pointer to "matchmaking tech" I would like to see in the future, with the dream being that everyone can do the work they love with people they match well with. ("live markets", for the job market.)
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: work, account, every, day.

artifacts.title: Work receipt from 2025-10-15
artifacts.excerpt: I think I've worked on this enough now to check if there's value in it in this state; if there's interest I'd be happy to work on it more (e.g. by reworking the search). I expect to maintain this out of pocket for the foreseeable future
